name: Neo4j Navigator
description: Use a Neo4j knowledge graph as a read-only RAG assistant: map graph structure, find concepts, walk bounded branches, discover paths, and return source or chunk locators for downstream retrieval.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Validate configuration and test the Neo4j Query API v2 connection without exposing credentials.

tools.name: graph_overview
tools.description: Orient to the graph before retrieval. Returns top labels, relationship types, property keys, and indexes with compact counts.

limit.description: Maximum entries per schema category. Default 25.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Schema-flexible substring search across configured node properties. Returns compact identity values and source locators rather than full node payloads.

query.description: Concrete concept, entity, topic, or exact phrase to find.

search_properties.description: Comma-separated properties to search. Defaults to name,title,description,summary,keywords,tags,text,content.

identity_properties.description: Comma-separated identity properties returned for nodes.

locator_properties.description: Comma-separated source-pointer properties returned for routing.

preview_chars.description: Maximum characters returned per property. Default 300.

tools.name: fulltext_search
tools.description: Query an existing Neo4j full-text node index for fast ranked concept lookup. Use graph_overview to discover index names first.

index_name.description: Existing Neo4j full-text node index name.

query.description: Lucene-style full-text query accepted by the index.

preview_chars.description: Maximum characters per returned property. Default 300.

tools.name: node_neighborhood
tools.description: Walk bounded branches around a node selected by a stable property/value pair. Useful after search_nodes identifies an anchor.

anchor_property.description: Stable node property such as id, key, slug, name, or title.

anchor_value.description: Exact property value selecting the anchor node.

tools.name: explore_branches
tools.description: Find matching seed nodes, then walk nearby graph branches to reveal related concepts, relationship chains, and promising retrieval directions.

query.description: Concept used to locate starting nodes.

tools.name: route_sources
tools.description: Use matching graph nodes and nearby branches to locate documents, files, URLs, chunks, collections, or indexes that a downstream retrieval engine should open next.

query.description: Question topic or concept needing evidence.

locator_properties.description: Properties treated as retrieval pointers. Defaults include path,file,url,source,source_url,chunk_id,document_id,collection,index.

tools.name: find_paths
tools.description: Find bounded shortest paths between concepts to explain how two topics, entities, documents, or systems connect.

search_properties.description: Properties used to locate both endpoints.

identity_properties.description: Identity properties returned per path node.

locator_properties.description: Source-pointer properties returned per path node.

env.NEO4J_PASSWORD: Required password when auth mode is basic
